resources.string: Chart will be shown here after games are played.

Summary
Games played: %1$d
Wins: %2$d
Losses: %3$d

Quiz
Correct answers: %4$d
Wrong answers: %5$d
Success: %6$d%%
Total score: %7$d

Pairs
Correct pairs: %8$d
Total pairs: %9$d
Success: %10$d%%
Total score: %11$d

Step by Step
Solved rounds: %12$d
Best solved step: %13$s
Total score: %14$d

My Number
Exact hits: %15$d
Close hits: %16$d
Total score: %17$d
Scan this code to add friend
Correct answer: +10 | Wrong answer: -5 \nEach question lasts 5 seconds. Faster correct player gets points.
Connect singers with their songs. Each correct connection gives +2 points.
Second chance: other player connects the remaining pairs.

Average score per game:
Ko zna zna: 34 / 50 Spojnice: 14 / 20 Asocijacije: 38 / 60 Skočko: 25 / 40 Korak po korak: 18 / 40 Moj broj: 7 / 20

Ko zna zna: Correct answers: 42 Wrong answers: 18
Moj broj: Exact target number found: 40%
Spojnice: Successfully connected pairs: 60%
Korak po korak: Step 1: 5% Step 2: 8% Step 3: 12% Step 4: 20% Step 5: 25% Step 6: 18% Step 7: 12%

Asocijacije: Solved: 9 Unsolved: 4
Skočko: Attempt 1: 5% Attempt 2: 10% Attempt 3: 20% Attempt 4: 25% Attempt 5: 25% Attempt 6: 15%
Total played games: 12 Wins: 7 Losses: 5 Win rate: 58% Loss rate: 42%
Password must have at least 6 characters.
Verify your email before logging in.
Registration successful. Check your email and confirm the account before logging in.
Select a region from the list.
User with that username does not exist.
Email for that username could not be found.
You must be logged in to change the password.
Registration successful. Check your email to activate your account.
Enter your current password and choose a new one.
Enter your account email and we will send you a password reset link.
Password reset link sent to your email.
Using offered numbers and operations +, -, *, /, (, ) try to get the target number.
Open clues one by one and try to guess as early as possible.
Open clues and guess the final answer
Player %1$d solved the round and won %2$d points.
Player %1$d missed the answer. Player %2$d now has 10 seconds for a 5-point bonus.
Player %1$d solved the bonus chance and won 5 points.
User: %1$s Email: %2$s Region: %3$s Tokens: %4$d Stars: %5$d League: %6$d
Stop the target and offered numbers first
Build an expression and reach the target number
First stop the target and offered numbers.
Use only numbers and operations +, -, *, /, ( and ).
Use only offered numbers and each at most once.
Time is up. Target number was %1$d.
Round %1$d/2. Player %2$d starts. Stop the target number.
Round %1$d/2. Player %2$d is choosing. Stop the offered numbers.
Round %1$d/2. Player %2$d started. Both players can enter expressions and submit when ready.
Stop the target first, then stop the offered numbers. If you do not press STOP within 5 seconds, values lock automatically. You can also lock them with a shake gesture.
Both players can now enter expressions. Tap Submit round when you want to score this round, or wait for the timer to expire.
At least one player must enter an expression before submitting the round.
Are you sure you want to change your password?
Play games, collect stars and climb the league!
Guest mode shows the full lobby as preview. Log in or register to unlock profile, statistics, friends and saved progress.
Log in to save tokens, collect stars and join a league.
Preview only. Log in to join the weekly ranking.
Log in to add friends and send invites.
A match starts only from this button and then follows the required round order.
These round cards stay visible as a guide, but the match starts only from the Start Match button.
Point the camera at the QR code
Camera permission is required to scan QR codes.
This player is already in a match.
This player is offline right now.
This round will be moved to a dedicated fragment later. For now you can continue the match in the official order.
A match starts from Start Match and follows the official project round order.
You are already in the main room.
Friends panel and invitations are available in the shared lobby layout and can be connected later.
Friends and invitations will be connected here when your teammate finishes that part.
Token purchase screen can be connected here later.
The ranking screen can be connected here later. The shared template already exposes the entry point.
Help content can be added here later.
FAQ content can be added here later.
Chat bubble is ready in the shared match header. Message sending can be connected later.
Messages update in real time for players from your region.
Only players from the same region can exchange messages here. Your messages appear on the right, while other players appear on the left.
No messages yet. Start the regional conversation.
Regional chat is not available because your region is missing.
You cannot chat with this player because you are not from the same region.
Log in or register to open this section.
Are you sure you want to quit the match? This will count as a loss.
You need at least 5 questions in Firestore.
No answer. Moving to next question.
Not enough Spojnice rounds in database.
You need at least 2 Spojnice rounds in Firestore.
First player connects all 5 pairs. If some pairs remain, the other player gets a second chance.
Select one item from both columns.
All pairs solved in this round.
Second chance: Player %1$d connects the remaining %2$d pairs.
Second player gets 30 seconds for remaining pairs.
Choose one of the four answers. Correct answer gives +10 points, wrong answer gives -5 points.
Connect each item from the left column with the correct item from the right column. Each correct pair gives +2 points.

Solved rounds: %1$d Best step: %2$s Score: %3$d
Step 1: %4$d%% Step 2: %5$d%% Step 3: %6$d%% Step 4: %7$d%% Step 5: %8$d%% Step 6: %9$d%% Step 7: %10$d%%
Rematch request sent. Waiting for the other player to answer.
Waiting for the other player to answer the rematch request.
This is a sample notification message that can be a little longer.
Wrong or no solution. Next player\'s turn.
Room code: %1$s\n\nOpen the room on this device and enter the same code on the second device.
Wait for your turn on the other device.
Spojnice round 1/2. Player 1 starts connecting pairs.
Spojnice round 2/2. Player 2 starts connecting pairs.
Second chance: Player %1$d now connects the remaining %2$d pairs.
Starter missed all 6 tries. Player %1$d now has a 10 second bonus chance.
Player %1$d solved the Skocko round and earned %2$d points.
Nobody solved the Skocko combination in time.
Asocijacije round 1/2. Player 1 opens the first field.
Asocijacije round 2/2. Player 2 opens the first field.
Player %1$d is now on turn in Asocijacije.
Player %1$d can continue solving after the correct guess.
Player %1$d solved the final association and earned %2$d points.
Player %1$d ran out of time. Player %2$d has a 10 second bonus chance.
Player %1$d solved the answer and earned %2$d points.
Player %1$d used the bonus chance and earned 5 points.
My Number round 1/2. Player 1 locks the target and numbers.
My Number round 2/2. Player 2 locks the target and numbers.
Player %1$d locked the target. Now lock the offered numbers.
Player %1$d enters the expression for round %2$d/2.
Round %1$d/2. Both players can now enter expressions.
Player %1$d wins because the other player quit the match.
Player %1$d quit the match. Player %2$d continues.
The other player left the match. You continue playing.
Region map could not be loaded.
Select a region on the map.

%1$s %2$s%3$s

Monthly stars: %4$d

First places: %5$d
Second places: %6$d
Third places: %7$d

Active players: %8$d
Registered players: %9$d
This will save the current top 3 regions, reset monthly stars to zero and award region frames on profile reload.
Create a 4-player challenge, match the same stake, then each player completes a solo full match once.
Choose the stake for every player. Maximum: 2 tokens and 10 stars. At least one of them must be greater than zero.
No active challenges yet. Post the first one from this page.
All 4 players joined. Each player can now play a solo match.
Challenge in progress. Waiting for all submitted scores.
Challenge finished. Final standings are shown below.
You joined this challenge. Your turn will unlock as soon as the room is full.
Your score is submitted. Waiting for the remaining players.
Challenge posted. Waiting for 3 more players.
Challenge canceled and all stakes returned.
Your solo match score was submitted. Open Regions to follow the final standings.
Challenge scoreboard updates on the Regions page.
This debug helper adds 2 tokens and 10 stars to the currently logged-in user so you can test challenges more easily.
Test resources added. New balance: %1$d token(s), %2$d star(s).
Quit this challenge run? Your current accumulated score will be submitted.
Challenge round %1$d. Solve My Number solo.
Question %1$d / %2$d. Solve it on your own.
Connect all 5 pairs on your own. Each correct connection gives +2 points.
Challenge round %1$d. Solve the combination on your own.
Challenge round %1$d. Open clues and solve the answer on your own.
You solved the round and won %1$d points.
Time is up. No points won this round.
Wrong or no solution. Continue solving.
Challenge round %1$d. Stop the target number.
Challenge round %1$d. Stop the offered numbers.
Challenge round %1$d. Enter your expression and submit when ready.
You can now enter your expression. Tap Submit round when you want to score this round, or wait for the timer to expire.
Enter your expression before submitting the round.
